Identity.Name: StingZoneCodes
Identity.Definition: Zone codes for the third segment (ZONE) of the STING 8-segment tag. This is a PROJECT-SCOPED TEMPLATE — values are replaced per project via <project>/_BIM_COORD/enums/StingZoneCodes.xml. Per-element ZONE values must additionally reference an IfcZone via IfcRelAssignsToGroup whose Pset_StingSpatialCodes.ZoneCode matches (cross-entity IDS rule). Zone categories include fire compartments, acoustic zones, clinical zones, pressure regimes, HVAC zones — projects choose their semantic.

Governance.StandardsBasis: ISO 19650-2 §5.3 spatial structure; BS 9999 (fire compartmentation); HTM 03-01 (clinical pressure regimes); CIBSE Guide A (HVAC zoning); cross-bound to IfcZone via Pset_StingSpatialCodes

Value.Definition: PLACEHOLDER — Zone 1. Projects replace with site-specific zone names (e.g. WARD-A, OR-SUITE, ATRIUM).
Project-wide / multi-zone. Reserved code for elements that genuinely cross every zone (e.g. main vertical risers).
Unknown / not yet assigned. IDS fails at Stage 3+.
Wildcard for routing rules. Never tagged on an element.
